rule.statement: Extractor MUST emit output conforming to a Pydantic model; raw text is rejected.
rule.rationale: Schema enforcement prevents downstream string-parsing fragility.

rule.statement: Output MUST include a confidence score per field, not per document.
rule.rationale: Per-field scores let the review queue surface only the suspect fields.

rule.statement: Deterministic post-validator MUST run after the VLM call (totals add up, dates parseable, IDs checksum).
rule.rationale: VLMs hallucinate numbers; deterministic re-check catches most cases.

rule.statement: Post-validator failure MUST route the document to a human review queue, not silently drop.
rule.rationale: Silent drops lose data; review queues preserve auditable trail.

rule.statement: A doc-type classifier MUST select the prompt + schema before extraction.
rule.rationale: Single mega-prompt across all doc types regresses on accuracy.
